subcodes.first_line: These are days wherein the dwellers of earth and heaven have been seized with intoxication, and the effulgent rays of the Sun of trials and tests have shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایامیست که سکر سکان سموآت و ارض را اخذ نموده و اشراقات شمس افتتان و امتحان
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
